/*eslint-disable*/ import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; // components import IndexNavbar from "components/Navbars/IndexNavbar.js"; import Footer from "components/Footers/Footer.js"; export default function Landing() { const [currentIndex, setCurrentIndex] = useState(0); const greetings = [ { text: "مرحباً", language: "العربية" }, { text: "Hello", language: "English" }, { text: "Bonjour", language: "Français" }, { text: "Hola", language: "Español" }, { text: "Ciao", language: "Italiano" }, { text: "Hallo", language: "Deutsch" }, { text: "Olá", language: "Português" }, { text: "Привет", language: "Русский" }, { text: "你好", language: "中文" }, { text: "こんにちは", language: "日本語" }, { text: "안녕하세요", language: "한국어" }, { text: "Merhaba", language: "Türkçe" } ]; useEffect(() => { const interval = setInterval(() => { setCurrentIndex((prevIndex) => (prevIndex + 1) % greetings.length); }, 2000); return () => clearInterval(interval); }, [greetings.length]); return ( <>
{/* النص المتحرك بعدة لغات */}
{greetings[currentIndex].text} ({greetings[currentIndex].language})
